props.name: disabled
props.comment: When true, the polling is skipped.

props.name: interval
props.comment: Interval in milliseconds between two checks. Defaults to 60000 (1 minute).

props.name: notification
props.comment:
Notification rendered when a new version is detected.
Defaults to `<ApplicationUpdatedNotification />`.

props.name: url
props.comment:
URL to download to check for code update. Defaults to
`window.location.origin + "/index.html"`.
